description: This document describes the test taxonomy and structure for the structural_engineering_lib test suite.

files.name: test_column_helical.py
files.description: Tests for IS 456 Cl 39.4 helical reinforcement check.

classes.name: TestBasicAdequate
classes.description: Test 1: Adequate helical ratio and pitch → is_adequate=True.

classes.name: TestEnhancementFactor
classes.description: Test 2: Enhancement factor = 1.05 per IS 456 Cl 39.4.

classes.name: TestPitchLimits
classes.description: Tests 4-7: Pitch limit violations and boundary conditions.

classes.name: TestInputValidation
classes.description: Tests 8-11: Input validation raises appropriate errors.

classes.name: TestBenchmarkCircularColumn
classes.description: Test 12: Hand-calculated benchmark for circular column.

files.name: test_column_long.py
files.description: Tests for IS 456 Cl 39.7 long (slender) column design.

classes.name: TestShortColumnBypass
classes.description: Test 1: Both axes short (le/D < 12) — no additional moment.

classes.name: TestSlenderSingleAxis
classes.description: Tests 2-3: Slender on one axis only.

classes.name: TestSlenderBothAxes
classes.description: Test 4: Slender on both axes with biaxial check.

classes.name: TestInitialMomentBraced
classes.description: Test 5: Braced column initial moment calculation.

classes.name: TestPureAxialSlender
classes.description: Test 8: Pu > 0, all moments zero → governed by Ma.

classes.name: TestPuExceedsPuz
classes.description: Test 12: Pu > Puz → k=0, unsafe warning.

classes.name: TestPuZeroNoAdditionalMoment
classes.description: Test 13: Pu=0 → Ma=0 (no additional moment regardless of slenderness).

classes.name: TestDoubleCurvature
classes.description: Test 14: Opposite sign M1 and M2 (double curvature reduces Mi for braced).

classes.name: TestInputValidation
classes.description: Tests 15-18: Input validation raises appropriate errors.

classes.name: TestBenchmarkBracedSlender
classes.description: Test 22: Hand-calculated benchmark for braced slender column.
